# Curator Receipt

## Decision

Kept: this source should enter the institute as a serious research artifact candidate.

## Why

It is a formal research paper with clear empirical substance, including a large-scale quantitative study of 33k agent-authored GitHub pull requests, statistical analysis of merge outcomes and CI failures, and a qualitative taxonomy derived from 600 rejected pull requests. That meets the institute bar for real experimental and field-relevant evidence rather than commentary or theorycraft.

## Limits

## Why
